sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n13749" key="a)posmi/leuma" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀποσμίλ-ευμα</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">[ι], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ατος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>,</foreign> <sense id="n13749.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">a chip, shaving,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
